flashcards.front: What is the sign rule when adding two negative numbers?
flashcards.back: Add their magnitudes and keep the negative sign (e.g. $-3 + (-4) = -7$).

flashcards.front: What is the sign rule when adding a positive and a negative number?
flashcards.back: Subtract the smaller magnitude from the larger magnitude, and keep the sign of the larger magnitude (e.g. $-10 + 4 = -6$).

flashcards.front: How do you rewrite subtraction of integers?
flashcards.back: Add the opposite of the number being subtracted (e.g. $a - (-b) = a + b$).

flashcards.front: What is the sign of the product when multiplying two negative numbers?
What is the sign of the quotient when dividing a negative by a positive?
